title: The Deceiver
writer: Jack Cunningham, Abem Finkel, Charles Logue
actors: Lloyd Hughes, Dorothy Sebastian, Ian Keith
plot: Broadway matinee idol, Shakespearean actor Reginald Thorpe, is found dead in his dressing room on the eve of his departure for Hollywood. Thorpe's understudy, Tony Hill, is suspected, particularly in light of his skill with knives...
